name: claude-code-forge
description: A curated collection of plugins for Claude Code, enhancing your AI-powered development workflow.

plugins.name: pdforge
plugins.description: Product Development Forge - AI-driven 7-phase product development workflow. Provides complete methodology from requirements analysis to deployment, including brainstorming, TDD, three-stage review, and auto-fix loops.

plugins.name: adversarial-debugger
plugins.description: Adversarial Debugging with Agent Teams - Multiple agents investigate competing hypotheses in parallel, challenge each other's findings through structured debate, and converge on the true root cause.

plugins.name: design-clone
plugins.description: Design DNA extraction + pixel-perfect website cloning. Combines programmatic CSS extraction (Browser MCP + getComputedStyle) with a 3-dimension design profile schema (design system / design style / visual effects). Two modes: --dna-only outputs a structured 150+ field Design DNA JSON; --full additionally generates a Next.js pixel-perfect clone via parallel builder agents.

plugins.name: forge-teams
plugins.description: Agent Teams Product Development Pipeline - 7-phase adversarial collaborative development with multi-agent debate, competition, and cross-validation at every critical decision point, including red team attacks, adversarial debugging, independent bug fix loop, and requirement verification.

plugins.name: persona-distill
plugins.description: Persona Distillation Ecosystem — a parameterized schema library + generation/evaluation/scheduling/debate toolkit for distilling personas (people or rule systems) into self-contained Claude Code skills. 5 skills, 9 persona schemas, 19 reusable components (incl. execution-profile via Klein-RPD/CDM 4-sweep), 9-phase pipeline with v0.4.0 security hardening (consent attestation, untrusted-corpus discipline, fingerprint verification, self-containment linter, rubric config lock, corpus access declaration).

plugins.name: skill-evolve
plugins.description: Skill Evolution Engine — Darwin-style autonomous SKILL.md optimizer. Applies an 8-dimension rubric (60 structural + 40 effectiveness), independent-subagent scoring, and git-backed ratchet hill-climbing (keep-or-revert) to evolve any Claude Code skill from initial draft toward 90+. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch and alchaincyf/darwin-skill.

plugins.name: ratchet
plugins.description: Ratchet — Goal-driven multi-agent persistent optimization system. Combines Goal-Driven master/subagent separation with AutoResearch signal design methodology. Implements an 'independent evaluation + kill-and-restart + ratchet progress' autonomous loop: master only judges, subagent only executes; if a subagent stalls or claims success without meeting acceptance criteria, it is killed and replaced. Suitable for long-running autonomous coding tasks that require verifiable deliverables and explicit termination conditions.

plugins.name: done-when-pipeline
plugins.description: Done_When Pipeline — turn fuzzy natural-language requirements into machine-verifiable completion contracts, then run a multi-agent acceptance loop against an implementation. Three skills cover Steps 1-6: `acceptance-spec` (Steps 1-3: NL → EARS spec + done_when.yaml via strict 3-question-type clarify loop + S2.5 spec-self-adversarial pass that emits spec-robustness.md identifying gaming vectors per the 6 RHD patterns — 5-file output), `test-suite-generator` (Step 4: EARS → full test pyramid with existence/unit/integration/e2e tests + mutation-testing anti-reward-hacking + fitness rubrics), and `acceptance-fleet` (Steps 5-6: 7-role evaluation fleet — test-runner / existence-checker / requirement-tracer / design-reviewer / adversarial-reviewer / edge-case-hunter / e2e-explorer — plus a standalone spec-gaming-detector, non-debating meta-judge synthesis, four-state ratchet DONE/FIX/SPEC_DRIFT/GAMING_RISK with full ratchet-log/iteration-NNN trace persistence; cross-vendor evaluators preferred — Codex/Gemini break the Claude-reviewing-Claude sycophancy loop). The /ratchet hand-off remains supported as a legacy lighter path. Anti-gaming structural guarantee: implementation agents MUST NOT see evaluator prompts; minimum medium isolation (mixed Claude sizes) enforced. Borrows file formats from OpenSpec, clarify protocol from GitHub Spec Kit, role design from Anthropic Code Review + BMAD edge-case-hunter + Builder.io QRA, all without CLI integration. Design philosophy: verifiable beats judgeable; debate amplifies bias (use meta-judge, not debate); PBT + mutation + cross-vendor review close the reward-hacking loop.

plugins.name: bespoke-design-system
plugins.description: Generate a bespoke DESIGN.md for any product brief by reverse-engineering a corpus of existing DESIGN.md design systems into a computable design grammar (rules + rationale + relationships), then forward-generating with three-part rationale (inheritance + adaptation + justification). Outputs the v4: 5-check P0 gate (coherence/archetype/kansei/neighbor + rationale-judge) + OD-dialect 9-section DESIGN.md format (Visual Theme & Atmosphere / Color Palette & Roles / Typography Rules / Component Stylings / Layout Principles / Depth & Elevation / Do's and Don'ts / Responsive Behavior / Agent Prompt Guide) consumable by any DESIGN.md-compatible tool (OD, Claude Design, Stitch). Two interaction modes: interactive (one-shot question batching, max 7 questions, never interrupts mid-generation) or auto (zero-questions, default-driven inference). Self-evolving: high-frequency adaptations consolidate into new rules. Material library is decoupled — works with OD's ~140 systems, awesome-design-md, or any DESIGN.md collection.
